Perpustakaan memiliki kebijakan tertulis: The library has a clear and implemented written policy regarding collection development, which includes selection, procurement, evaluation, weeding, and involvement of academics.
Perpustakaan secara rutin melakukan peng: The library routinely procures or adds collections to support academic needs, in accordance with developments in science, curriculum and requests from the academic community from the previous year
Presentase program studi Universitas yan: Percentage of University study programs that have a core collection
Perpustakaan secara berkala melakukan ev: The library periodically evaluates collections to ensure the relevance, accuracy and up-to-dateness of collection contents for academic needs
Perpustakaan melaksanakan kegiatan selek: The library carries out library material selection activities in a planned, objective manner and based on the needs of the academic community, curriculum relevance and scientific developments.
Perpustakaan memiliki jumlah koleksi yan: The library has an adequate number of collections, in accordance with curriculum needs and the number of academics, in printed and electronic/digital form
Perpustakaan universitas memiliki alat a: University libraries have tools or facilities for easier and faster access to collections
Perpustakaan menyediakan akses terhadap:
Libraries provide access to electronic collections (e-resources) such as e-books, e-journals, scientific databases and digital repositories to support learning and research needs
academic community
Perpustakaan mengelola repositori instit: The library manages institutional repositories as a center for storing, managing and disseminating scientific work of academicians in digital format that can be accessed openly and sustainably by academicians
Persentase penambahan jumlah unggahan ka: Percentage of increase in the number of uploads of scientific work by academics to institutional repositories per year
Perpustakaan melaksanakan pengorganisasi: The library organizes collections systematically and according to standards to facilitate information retrieval for the academic community.
Kegiatan pelestarian koleksi dalam upaya: Collection preservation activities in an effort to maintain the physical condition and information content to extend the useful life of the collection to 3 (three) years.
Perpustakaan memiliki luas gedung atau r: The library has an adequate and representative building or space to support service functions, collection management, literacy activities, and the comfort of the academic community.
Ruang atau area yang terdapat pada perpu: The room or area in the library.
Perpustakaan memiliki sarana dan prasara: The library has adequate, appropriate and functional facilities and infrastructure to support service activities, access to information, collection management, comfort and safety of the academic community.
Tersedianya perabot dan peralatan perpus: Availability of library furniture and equipment that supports comfortable reading activities as needed
Ketersediaan perangkat komputer untuk me: Availability of computer equipment to support service functions
Perpustakaan menyediakan perangkat multi: The library provides adequate multimedia devices to support information services, independent learning and digital literacy activities for the academic community.
Legalitas perangkat lunak yang digunakan: Legality of software used to support library operations
Perpustakaan menyediakan sarana keamanan: The library provides adequate security and safety facilities to protect collections, academics and staff, as well as support orderly operational services.
Perpustakaan melaksanakan pengawasan sec: The library carries out regular supervision of the condition of facilities, infrastructure and physical environment to ensure comfort, security and smooth running of library services

Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan berbagai j: The library provides various types of services that support the functions of education, research and community service actively and sustainably
Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan layanan si: The library provides circulation services (loans, returns, extensions, reservations) with a system that is well managed, digitalized, and easily accessible to the academic community.
Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan sistem lay: The library organizes a reference service system that is professional, structured, and capable of assisting academics in finding, evaluating, and utilizing scientific information sources effectively.
Perpustakaan menyediakan sistem akses la: The library provides a service access system that is easy, fast and accessible to academics offline and online by paying attention to inclusivity and comfort for academics
Perpustakaan menyediakan berbagai jenis: The library provides various types of research consultation services that help academics in the research, scientific writing and publication processes, both technically and academically.
Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan layanan pi: The library provides inter-library loan services to expand access to information for academics and support academic activities that cannot be fulfilled from local collections
Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan kegiatan \: The library organizes information literacy activities/services in a structured and sustainable manner to improve the academic community's ability to access, evaluate and use information effectively and responsibly.
Perpustakaan menyelenggarakan layanan ek: The library provides extension services as part of the university's contribution to community service and expanding access to information outside the academic community in the last 3 years
Perpustakaan memiliki sistem layanan pen: The library has a complaints/complaints service system that is clear, responsive, and used actively to improve library services
Perpustakaan melaksanakan kegiatan orien: The library carries out orientation activities regularly every year for new students or new academics to introduce the services, collections, facilities and information access systems in the library.

Perpustakaan memiliki pustakawan memadai: The library has adequate librarians to support library services and development effectively and sustainably.

Perpustakaan memiliki tenaga perpustakaa: The library has library staff (librarians and technical staff) who are competency certified according to their level and field of work
Tenaga Perpustakaan yang mengikuti kegia: Library staff who take part in activities to continuously increase the competency of librarians and technical staff to support service quality and digital transformation in the last 1 (one) year.
Perpustakaan memiliki status kelembagaan: The library has a clear institutional status and a strategic position in the university's organizational structure to support academic functions optimally.
Perpustakaan memiliki dokumen perencanaa: The library has work planning documents and meets performance milestones.

Pengakuan terhadap kinerja penyelenggara: Recognition of the performance of library management in the last 3 (three) years
